competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

provider.name: FIFA Official API

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).
Attempt saved. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Diogo Costa (Portugal).
Attempt missed. João Cancelo (Portugal) right footed shot from the right side of the box is too high. Assisted by Nuno Mendes.

events.description: 若昂·坎塞洛射门偏出。 努诺·门德斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Dani Olmo with a through ball following a fast break.

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔射门偏出。 丹尼·奥尔莫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Pedri.
Attempt blocked. Pedro Neto (Portugal) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 佩德罗·内托射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Pedro Porro (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

player.name: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Unai Simón (Spain). Assisted by Bruno Fernandes.

events.description: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多射正。 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Unai Simón.
Attempt missed. Álex Baena (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right.

events.description: 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Diogo Costa (Portugal). Assisted by Rodri.

events.description: 亚马尔射正。 罗德里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Álex Baena (Spain) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Diogo Costa (Portugal).
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Diogo Costa.
Foul by Álex Baena (Spain).
Offside, Portugal. Bruno Fernandes is caught offside.
Álex Baena (Spain) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt missed. Pedro Porro (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left following a set piece situation.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Nuno Mendes.
Attempt missed. Dani Olmo (Spain) header from the centre of the box misses to the left following a corner.

relatedPlayer.name: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Aymeric Laporte (Spain).

events.description: 艾默里克·拉波尔特犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).

player.name: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box is saved in the centre of the goal by Unai Simón (Spain).

events.description: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多射正。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury João Félix (Portugal).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Pedro Porro (Spain).
Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Álex Baena.
Attempt blocked. Nuno Mendes (Portugal) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by João Félix.

events.description: 努诺·门德斯射门被封堵。 若昂·菲利克斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Rodri (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Mikel Oyarzabal.

events.description: 罗德里射门偏出。 奥亚萨瓦尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Spain. Lamine Yamal is caught offside.
Dani Olmo (Spain) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

relatedPlayer.name: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Dani Olmo (Spain).
Foul by Pau Cubarsí (Spain).
Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).
Pedro Porro (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match because of an injury Nuno Mendes (Portugal).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Portugal. Nélson Semedo replaces Nuno Mendes because of an injury.

events.description: 内尔松·塞梅多替补登场，换下努诺·门德斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Portugal. Cristiano Ronaldo is caught offside.

player.name: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by João Félix.

events.description: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多射门偏出。 若昂·菲利克斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).
Attempt blocked. Pedri (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Dani Olmo.

events.description: 佩德里射门被封堵。 丹尼·奥尔莫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Renato Veiga.
Corner, Spain. Conceded by João Félix.
Attempt blocked. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Foul by Pedri (Spain).
Attempt saved. Álex Baena (Spain) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Diogo Costa (Portugal).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Portugal. Diogo Dalot replaces João Cancelo.

events.description: 迪奥戈·达洛特替补登场，换下若昂·坎塞洛。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Portugal. Rafael Leão replaces João Félix.

events.description: 拉斐尔·莱奥替补登场，换下若昂·菲利克斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Lamine Yamal (Spain) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt saved. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from a difficult angle and long range on the right is saved in the top centre of the goal by Diogo Costa (Portugal).
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Diogo Costa.
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Álex Baena.

events.description: 费兰·托雷斯替补登场，换下阿莱克斯·巴埃纳。

relatedPlayer.name: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Vitinha (Portugal) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Cristiano Ronaldo.

events.description: 维蒂尼亚射门被封堵。 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) right footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses to the right.

events.description: 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ferran Torres (Spain) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right misses to the right. Assisted by Pedri with a through ball.

events.description: 费兰·托雷斯射门偏出。 佩德里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Dani Olmo (Spain) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Mikel Oyarzabal.

events.description: 丹尼·奥尔莫射门被封堵。 奥亚萨瓦尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Rúben Dias.
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Nélson Semedo.
Substitution, Portugal. Francisco Conceição replaces Pedro Neto.

events.description: 弗朗西斯科·孔塞桑替补登场，换下佩德罗·内托。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Portugal. Bernardo Silva replaces Vitinha.

events.description: 贝尔纳多·席尔瓦替补登场，换下维蒂尼亚。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).
Substitution, Spain. Fabián Ruiz replaces Pedri.

events.description: 法比安·鲁伊斯替补登场，换下佩德里。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.

events.description: 米克尔·梅里诺替补登场，换下丹尼·奥尔莫。

qualifiers.espnText: Mikel Merino (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Bernardo Silva (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 贝尔纳多·席尔瓦吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Mikel Merino (Spain) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Portugal 0, Spain 1. Mikel Merino (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ferran Torres with a through ball.

events.description: 米克尔·梅里诺破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Lamine Yamal (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Renato Veiga (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Attempt missed. Bernardo Silva (Portugal) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Francisco Conceição with a cross.

events.description: 贝尔纳多·席尔瓦射门偏出。 弗朗西斯科·孔塞桑参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Spain. Borja Iglesias replaces Mikel Oyarzabal.

events.description: 博尔哈·伊格莱西亚斯替补登场，换下奥亚萨瓦尔。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ferran Torres (Spain).
Ferran Torres (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Attempt missed. João Neves (Portugal) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Bruno Fernandes with a cross following a set piece situation.

events.description: 若昂·内维斯射门偏出。 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half ends, Portugal 0, Spain 1.
